title: After Iran assault, Russians say U.S. can’t be trusted in Ukraine talks
summary_full: As Washington focuses on its push to topple Iran’s government, delaying talks on Russia’s war in Ukraine, some in Moscow say the Kremlin must achieve its goals militarily.
summary_public: As Washington focuses on its push to topple Iran’s government, delaying talks on Russia’s war in Ukraine, some in Moscow say the Kremlin must achieve its goals militarily.

RU.evidence: delaying talks on Russia’s war in Ukraine
